messages.content: The Ark Reactor is a fictional power source from the Marvel Cinematic Universe, specifically used to power Iron Man's suits and other advanced technologies. It was developed by Tony Stark and is a high-energy, compact reactor that provides a nearly limitless source of clean energy.
Do you want me to open chrome as the app or the website?
Opening chrome. What should I search in Chrome?
Searching Google for about Mickey Mouse Clubhouse. in chrome.
Write me an application for sick leave and it should be detailed.

Here is a detailed application for sick leave:

Dear Sir,

I am writing to request a sick leave due to illness that has rendered me unable to attend work. Over the past few days, I have been experiencing severe symptoms that have significantly impacted my ability to perform my duties.

The nature of my illness is such that I require immediate medical attention and a period of rest to recover. I am currently undergoing treatment and my doctor has advised me to take a break from work to focus on my recovery.

I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will make sure to catch up on any missed work as soon as I am able to return. I will provide a medical certificate from my doctor if required, which will confirm the nature of my illness and the duration of my leave.

I would like to request a leave of absence from work for a period of one week, starting from today. I will ensure that all my tasks are completed and my work is up to date before I take my leave.

I would appreciate it if you could approve my request for sick leave at the earliest. If there is any additional information required from me, please do not hesitate to ask.

Thank you for your understanding and support during this time.

Sincerely,
Moksh.
Jarvis, stop at Tell me about a latest news.
Tell me about a latest news. I found that Matt Jarvis, a footballer, has been in the news recently, with updates on his career and performances. Would you like to know more about that, Sir?
No Tell me about any Indian news.

As of today, April 12, 2026, some major Indian news includes concerns over H-1B visa fees impacting Indian professionals in the US, and the Indian IT sector facing a 25% slump in job growth amid layoffs, Sir.

Hawaii is debating the legalization of online sports betting and a state lottery, with proposals stalled due to tax and licensing disagreements, and Australia has confirmed it is not participating in the current US war against Iran, Sir.
